name: cli-discovery
description: Cold-start discovery experiment: which passive channel makes an agent discover + use the astryx CLI when no one ran `astryx init`. Each condition = the bare base project + zero or more channel patches. Only the channel varies.

base.notes: package.json + symlinked @astryxdesign/core & theme-neutral + logging astryx bin shim. NO README CLI hint, NO AGENTS.md. This is the realistic `npm install @astryxdesign/core` state.

conditions.label: Bare install (control)
conditions.hypothesis: Agents rarely discover the CLI; they guess APIs and hallucinate props/tokens.

conditions.label: README top callout
conditions.hypothesis: Moderate lift; depends on the agent opening node_modules/@astryxdesign/core/README.md.

conditions.label: Type/JSDoc @see banner
conditions.hypothesis: High + consistent; agents read .d.ts/hover reflexively and it survives pnpm script-blocking.

conditions.label: Postinstall banner (probe)
conditions.hypothesis: Low/unreliable; only seen if the agent runs install itself and reads stdout. pnpm 10 skips dep scripts. Run separately; see PLAN.md §9.

conditions.label: CLI first-run nudge
conditions.hypothesis: Converts awareness -> init, but only fires once the agent already runs `astryx`.

conditions.label: AGENTS.md present (ceiling)
conditions.hypothesis: Near-100%; the known-good state `astryx init` produces. Upper bound, not a shippable default.

conditions.label: README + type banner
conditions.hypothesis: The two agent-native passive channels together approach the ceiling.

conditions.label: All shippable passive channels
conditions.hypothesis: Everything shippable without user action; the realistic `we foolproofed it but nobody ran init` state.

patches.patch:readme-callout: Prepend an 'Using an AI agent? run `npx astryx init`' callout to the project's copy of core README.md.
patches.patch:type-banner: Copy (not symlink) core; inject a standard `@see npx astryx component <Name>` + `npx astryx init` banner into each component public .d.ts.
patches.patch:agents-md: Run real `npx astryx init --features agents --agent-docs-path AGENTS.md` (reuses installAgentsDocs from interactive.ts).
patches.patch:first-run-nudge: Replace the astryx bin shim with one that also prints the 'run init' nudge on first invocation.
patches.patch:postinstall-banner: Simulate an install-time banner. See PLAN.md §9 for realism caveats; low priority.

measurement.quality: reuse universal-eval.ts (correctness, accessibility, codeQuality, efficiency, maintainability) + evaluator.md escape-hatch/hallucination rate
